html:
Exclusive to:

The Cookie Cutter Cap is wearable Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 4 Cookie Cutter Shell and one Rope.

It has a Durability of 525 and absorbs 70% of physical damage, as well as granting 35% resistance to Wetness, the highest of any protective headgear. Not considering its durability, the Cookie Cutter Cap effectively adds 350 hp to the average survivor.

The Cookie Cutter Cap can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which will provide them with the damage absorption effect.

Trivia

  • The Cookie Cutter Cap was introduced in the Salty Dog update.


Gallery

  • Wortox wearing a Cookie Cutter Cap.
  • Wormwood wearing a Cookie Cutter Cap.
  • Wurt wearing a Cookie Cutter Cap.
  • Cookie Cutter Cap Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"cookiecutterhat"
“At least my hair will stay dry.”
–Wilson
“Matches my prickly personality.”
–Willow
“Keep head safe and dry!”
–Wolfgang
“I'm protected, but at what cost to my dignity.”
–Wendy
“I'LL SHIELD MYSELF WITH ITS DISGUSTING EXOSKELETON”
–WX-78
“Hm, it has a very disagreeable odor.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hope this shell protects me better than it protected the last guy.”
–Woodie
“This doesn't look dapper at all.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a helm fit för a warriör öf the deep.”
–Wigfrid
“We look like a hermit crab!”
–Webber
“Not the best looking hat, but c'est la vie.”
–Warly
“Spiny hat”
–Wormwood
“Hardhats must be worn beyond this point!”
–Winona
“With this spiny gear, I've nothing to fear!”
–Wortox
“Make good spiky hat!”
–Wurt
“It's a shellmet! Because it's a helmet, but a shell-- you get it.”
–Walter
“If you step back a good ways and squint, it almost looks fashionable.”
–Wanda
The Cookie Cutter Cap is wearable Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 4 Cookie Cutter Shell and one Rope.
It has a Durability of 525 and absorbs 70% of physical damage, as well as granting 35% resistance to Wetness, the highest of any protective headgear. Not considering its durability, the Cookie Cutter Cap effectively adds 350 hp to the average survivor.
The Cookie Cutter Cap can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which will provide them with the damage absorption effect.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Cookie Cutter Cap was introduced in the Salty Dog update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Cắt Bánh Quy là một loại Giáp có thể đeo được dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được chế tạo trong tab Chiến đấu. Nó yêu cầu 4 Vỏ cắt bánh quy và một Dây thừng.

The '''Cookie Cutter Cap''' is wearable [[Armor]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 4 [[Cookie Cutter Shell]] and one [[Rope]].

It has a Durability of 525 and absorbs 70% of physical damage, as well as granting 35% resistance to [[Wetness]], the highest of any protective headgear. Not considering its durability, the Cookie Cutter Cap effectively adds 350 hp to the average survivor.

The Cookie Cutter Cap can be given to a [[Pig]] or [[Bunnyman]] to wear, which will provide them with the damage absorption effect.

{{Clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Cookie Cutter Cap was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Version History|Salty Dog]]'' update.
